name: HVAC Companies
tagline: Heating and cooling shops missing from search.
display_description: Pulls HVAC and air-conditioning companies near you that take calls but have no website. The ones a homeowner can't find at 2pm in July when the unit quits — busy on referrals, invisible to everyone searching right now.
outreach_voice_brief: Write to an HVAC owner who runs trucks, not ads. Open with the real detail from the listing — strong reviews, a phone, no site. Make the point plainly: emergency cooling and heating searches spike in season, and the homeowner books whoever shows up, not whoever's best. Offer a page that takes the call when they're on a roof. One ask, no buzzwords.
